headerDisplay: Synthetic HomeKit cameras showing public NASA and space imagery. Each source appears as a separate camera in the Home app, cycling through periodically refreshed still images. **ffmpeg is required** — install it on your Homebridge host before using this plugin.
footerDisplay: Images are from public NASA/ESA sources. This is an unofficial community plugin. For a free NASA API key visit https://api.nasa.gov

name.title: Platform Name
name.description: The name shown in Homebridge logs.

enabled.title: Enable Plugin
enabled.description: Disable to remove all camera accessories without uninstalling.

apiKey.title: NASA API Key
apiKey.description: Optional. Without a key, DEMO_KEY is used (limited to 30 requests/hour, 50/day per IP). Get a free key at https://api.nasa.gov to increase limits.

defaultFrameIntervalSec.title: Default Frame Interval (seconds)
defaultFrameIntervalSec.description: How often the displayed image changes. Each camera can override this.

defaultRefreshIntervalSec.title: Default Refresh Interval (seconds)
defaultRefreshIntervalSec.description: How often new images are fetched from NASA. Minimum 5 minutes. Each camera can override this.

cameras.title: Cameras
cameras.description: Each entry creates a separate camera accessory in HomeKit.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Uncheck to hide this camera without deleting its config.

name.title: Camera Name
name.description: The name shown in the Home app.

sourceType.title: Image Source
sourceType.description: Which NASA image source to use for this camera.

frameIntervalSec.title: Frame Interval (seconds)
frameIntervalSec.description: Override how often the displayed image changes for this camera.

refreshIntervalSec.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
refreshIntervalSec.description: Override how often new images are fetched for this camera.

maxCacheItems.title: Max Cached Images
maxCacheItems.description: Maximum number of images to keep on disk for this camera.

maxDiskMb.title: Max Disk Usage (MB)
maxDiskMb.description: Maximum disk space for cached images.

shuffle.title: Shuffle Images
shuffle.description: Show images in random order instead of newest first.

retainLastGood.title: Keep Last Image on Error
retainLastGood.description: If a refresh fails, keep showing the last good image.

preferLandscape.title: Prefer Landscape Images
preferLandscape.description: When available, prefer wider images that look better on screens.
